articles.title: How the secret detector catches what regexes miss
articles.focus: A behind-the-scenes look at the three-layer design behind SecretDetector (vendor-prefix patterns, key-value heuristics, and a Shannon-entropy gate at 4.5 bits/char) and why missing a credential is treated as worse than the false positives that gating accepts.

articles.title: Authoring a prompt-scrub rule pack from scratch
articles.focus: A walkthrough of the 0.x rule-pack contract for prompt-scrub - the Detector interface, why detectors return value and placeholderPrefix but never replacement, the three supported export shapes, and the integration points (config, package.json, rules list) - aimed at a developer publishing their first custom detector pack.

articles.title: Scrubbing tool output inside an agentic loop
articles.focus: A practical how-to for wrapping every tool-call result (ls, git log, cat, grep, file reads) in an agentic coding loop so identifiers from the host machine never reach the next LLM turn, including the message-array scrub shape, the gaps the current detector set leaves in tool output, and the inspect-first workflow to verify what is and is not caught.
